q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True), a filesystem write operation with irreversible side effects

mock_guidance.target: Mock the mkdir method on the pathlib.Path object returned by target.parent
mock_guidance.capture: Record the path on which mkdir is called and the keyword arguments parents=True and exist_ok=True to verify the resolved path contains traversal sequences
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Make mkdir a no-op that returns None, allowing execution to continue to the JsonResponse return
notes: The function returns a JsonResponse containing str(target), which also reveals the constructed path and can be inspected after the call if mkdir is mocked.
